title: cymbopogon nardus subsp. hamatulus
intro: Cymbopogon nardus subsp. hamatulus, commonly known as East Indian lemongrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon nardus subsp. hamatulus include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
